scenes.title: Level 1
scenes.name: Converting units
teach: Learn Converting units.
This level trains Distance, Area & Volume.
You will see this skill several times in different forms to build memory.
worked: Example for Converting units
Read the question, identify the rule, then calculate step by step.
Review pattern
The game repeats this idea in practice, mini game, and boss form.
